_comment: Mock SerpAPI Google-search response, trimmed to the fields sources.py reads. Used in EXPERT_SOURCE_MODE=mock so dev spends zero SerpAPI searches. Shape mirrors SerpAPI's organic_results[] objects. Includes a duplicate link to exercise dedup.
